headline: These 3 ‘Old Economy’ Dow Stocks Are Quietly Crushing the Market, and Here’s What They All Share
summary: The Dow’s industrial-era anchors are quietly outpacing the broader market. Over the past year, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSEARCA: SPY) returned 24.37%, and the Dow tracker returned 20.22%. Three “old economy” Dow components have left both benchmarks in the dust, and they share more than just a ticker on the same index. What ... headline: Should You Buy Caterpillar (CAT) Amidst The Data Center Build Out?
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Latest Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy. Agricultural, construction, and power generation equipment manufacturer Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT)’s shares are up by 165% over the past year and by 55% year-to-date. The artificial intelligence boom has also proven to be a boon for the firm’s power generation products. […]
